---
title: "Foundations of Accounting Data"
format: html
---

### Learning Objectives of the Chapter {.unnumbered}


::: {.callout-note title = "Learning Objectives" collapse = "true"}

::: {style="text-align: justify"}
At the End of the Chapter, Students should be Able to -

- Gain an understanding about the types of accounting data

- Gain an understanding about the sources of accounting data

- Gain an understanding how accounting data can be collected

- Gain an understanding how accounting data are evolving

- Collect some accounting data 

:::

:::

See @fig-firstplot for first ggplot graph


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
library(tidyverse)
mtcars %>% 
  as_tibble() %>% 
  ggplot(mapping = aes(x = mpg, y = disp))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth()+
  labs(x = 'Miles Per Gallon (mpg)',
       y = 'Displacement in Cubic Inches (disp)')
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![Scatter plot and line plot of the relation between `mpg` and `disp`](foundations_files/figure-html/fig-firstplot-1.png){#fig-firstplot width=672}
:::
:::
